title: Field-Guide Outcomes, Command Language, and REPL Contract · Goroutine Forensics
summary: A preserved Go Pokedex run contains one plausible command, parsing, URL, JSON, client, cache, ownership, goroutine, cancellation, persistence, security, test, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded field-guide product and REPL charter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.
Specify command names, argument grammar, whitespace policy, help text, aliases, unknown-command behavior, and stable output contracts.
Model start, prompt, read, parse, dispatch, result, continue, EOF, quit, cancellation, and cleanup as explicit session states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence
steps.instruction:
Order the Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence Pokedex product engineering and Go HTTP evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Pokedex product engineering and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence, keep Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.text: A debug Go team handles case 1719 during a clean cross-platform package smoke. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence; browser code must remain deterministic and side-effect-free; then change one resource identity, pagination link, JSON field, status, or body budget and revalidate admission. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance E…
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: pokedex-go-acceptance-evidence-1xpmyt" that uses case 7702 to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence. Keep defaults runnable and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact PokéAPI, read or write host files, handle real terminal or OS signals, spawn unbounded work, or claim race, leak, load, accessibility, cross-platform, package, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, race and fuzz runs, temporary files, subprocess and signal harnesses, inspected artifacts, representative platforms, accessibility review, capacity, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence; failed and canceled commands must preserve the prior admitted state; then inject one redirect, control sequence, file, timeout, or persistence failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance E…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A screenshot of a successful command is sufficient acceptance evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Eviden…
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go team handles case 6767 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use traffic budget must remain enforced; then change one resource identity, pagination link, JSON field, status, or body budget and revalidate admission. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Eviden….
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Pokedex product engineering and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Pokedex Go Acceptance Eviden…, keep Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.
